titles.title: This Is Like Heaven To Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We find many people Who can't understand Why we are so happy and free, We've crossed over Jordan To Canaan's fair land, And this is like heaven to me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh this is like heaven to me, Yes, this is like heaven to me. I've crossed over Jordan To Canaan's fair land, And this is like heaven to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So when we are happy We sing and we shout, Some don't understand us, you see; We're filled with the Spirit, There is not a doubt, And this is like heaven to me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We've heard the sweet music, The heavenly chord From glory land over the sea; A soul-thrilling message From Jesus our Lord, And this is like heaven to me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh this is like heaven to me, Yes, this is like heaven to me. I've crossed over Jordan To Canaan's fair land, And this is like heaven to me.
